title: Dungeon Siege 2
notes: runs but there is a huge black square instead of cursor, main character's head is black, strange cursor behavior

title: Dungeon Siege 2
notes: The cursor and the main character's head is black. However the game functions. The mouse cursor being a black box could be distracting enough to make this game Unstable. Depends on how much you want to play

Black cursor and black hero head was fixed after installing d3dx9 using winetricks. Runtime Config Options did not help.

WINEPREFIX="$HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/39200/pfx" winetricks d3dx9
title: Dungeon Siege II

notes: Black box where cursor should be and black player head textures, but rest of the game renders and plays fine.  Probably wouldn't recommend until these get fixed as they do impact play experience quite a bit.
title: Dungeon Siege II

notes: Black box instead of cursor, PC's head is black also.
title: Dungeon Siege II

notes: Perfectly playable to the end after manually installing d3dx9. Only issue is that resolution gets screwed up after game loses focus
title: Dungeon Siege II

notes:
Played through the entire Game.
Just install DirectX9 in the prefix and enjoy the game. 

If the resolution strikes after you change the window (ALT+TAB) just set the resolution in options again eg. to 16bit and back to 32 bit color depth.
